violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the auto-dispenser of the 3-bay sink was in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC to call for service. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

Meatballs in sauce and potato soup, which were prepared in advance, were not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Inspector observed potato soup and meatballs in sauce that were prepared the day prior in the refrigerator at 46 and 45 degrees. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024
Per PIC, the drain plug to the sanitizing bay at the 3-bay sink will not remain open unless the lever is taped. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

The air conditioner unit in the kitchen area is in poor repair. Per PIC, air conditioner leaks; inspector observed a makeshift drain held with duct tape at the time of inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Thermometer in 2 door refrigerator observed in poor repair. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Per PIC, thermometer is on order. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2023
Ceiling tiles above serving area observed with water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2023

The floors under shelving in dry storage room has an accumulation of soil residue and old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023
